messages.content:
The desktop screen displays a wallpaper image of a person in a long dress standing in a battle scene with a horse and weapons, set against a background of a bright orange and yellow sky. 

On the screen, there are several icons visible on the left and right sides, including This PC, Visual Studio Code, Recycle Bin, Antigravity IDE, Control Panel, Claude, VLC media player, Codex, Microsoft Edge, AllDup, Google Chrome, Docker Desktop, YouTube, Play Grand Theft Auto, HackerRank, Git Bash, Polaris, Notes, Code Chef, presentation, and Code Hub. 

There is also a pop-up window on the right side with the title "Thinking..." and various options. The taskbar at the bottom shows the time as 8:28 PM on June 20.
